headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels withdraws from Europe market citing unfavorable conditions

sentiment.reasoning: Exiting a major market indicates a contraction in operations and potential loss of revenue streams.

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event with minimal expected impact on financial performance.

headlines.headline: Myrnon Therapeutics to host investor day focused on supply chain optimization strategy

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
